content.en:
"The space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure is just a legend, it has not really been born, if it is really conceived, then ......"

These Ultimate Ancient Demons were all excited, and they all fantasized that they could obtain this space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure.

But when their eyes looked at the Dovi Ancient Demon, they all had different thoughts.

In terms of strength, the Dovi Ancient Demon was indeed much stronger than them, and the possibility of snatching this space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure was extremely high.

But if it really allowed the Dovi Ancient Demon to snatch this space-time level Extreme Path Ultimate Treasure, maybe there was really hope to become a space-time level Ultimate Ancient Demon.

Even if he can't become a space-time level ultimate ancient demon, with the potential of the Dovi Ancient Demon, it will definitely make his strength skyrocket.

At that time, not to mention the ten top Ultimate Ancient Demons, even if dozens or hundreds of Ultimate Ancient Demons joined forces, they would not necessarily be able to defeat the Dovi Ancient Demons, and would even be slaughtered by the Dovi Ancient Demons.

Of course, they naturally didn't say anything at this time, otherwise they would have offended the Dovi Ancient Demon.

Then.

Duowei Ancient Demon opened his mouth and said: "It is impossible for this space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Arcana to be conceived in a short period of time, and there are still a few space-time bubbles that have not been fused in, after fusing these space-time bubbles, it should be able to accelerate the gestation process of this space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Arcana." "

"Hmm!"

The other Ultimate Ancient Demons nodded slightly.

Subsequently, they left one after another, after all, there was no point in staying here, and now this space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure had not been bred, if it was forcibly snatched, it would definitely encounter the interference of other Ultimate Ancient Demons.

Moreover, before this space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Arcana was conceived, it would definitely be protected by the large space-time bubble origin, and would be suppressed by the large-scale space-time bubble origin.

Therefore, no Ultimate Ancient Demon dared to do anything to forcibly destroy the Ultimate Treasure of the Space-Level Extreme Dao.

Whew!!!

In the blink of an eye.

The Ultimate Ancient Demons are gone.

......

The Abyss of Arromu.

this day.

An avatar of the Ultimate Ancient Demon has arrived here to visit the Aramu Ancient Demon.

This Ultimate Ancient Demon is the Ultimate Ancient Demon of Xuanyang's main department, named Yunyang Ancient Demon, ranking seventeenth on the Ultimate Ancient Demon List.

There are quite a few Ultimate Ancient Demons in the major main divisions, plus the Ultimate Ancient Demons who have not yet established the main division, the overall number is at least more than 1,700 Ultimate Ancient Demons.

These Ultimate Ancient Demons have been pitting each other for countless years, because they have a rough ranking on the list.

For this ranking, many Ultimate Ancient Demons were not convinced at first, but after countless battles, they finally acquiesced.

Yunyang Ancient Demon ranked seventeenth on the list of Ultimate Ancient Demons, and was undoubtedly the top Ultimate Ancient Demon.

The Alomu Ancient Demon is a little stronger, ranking ninth on the list.

Of course, except for the Duowei Ancient Demon, between the second and tenth places, the difference in strength is actually not large, even the Yunyang Ancient Demon is actually not much weaker than the Aromu Ancient Demon.

The Alomu Ancient Demon was sure to defeat the Yunyang Ancient Demon, but he couldn't kill the Yunyang Ancient Demon.

"Yunyang Ancient Demon, in this special period, what is the purpose of you coming to visit our Luo Mother Headquarters?"

The ancient demon of Aromu asked.

Yunyang Ancient Demon smiled and said, "Aromu Ancient Demon, it's very simple, about that space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure and Duowei Ancient Demon!"

"Yunyang Ancient Demon, what do you mean by that?"

The ancient demon of Aromu asked with an expressionless face.

Yunyang Ancient Demon said again: "It's very simple, presumably Luo Mu Ancient Demon, you don't want Duowei Ancient Demon to snatch that space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure, even if she can't break through to the space-time level Ultimate Ancient Demon, but if she is in charge of that treasure, her strength will inevitably skyrocket, even if many Ultimate Ancient Demons join forces, they can't suppress her, this is definitely not a situation we want to see." "

"So what?"

The Ancient Demon Dao of Aromu.

"Join forces. Yunyang Ancient Demon Dao: "We will join forces, and when the space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure is born, we will directly attack and kill the Duowei Ancient Demon." No matter how powerful the Dovi Ancient Demon is, it is only one, and dozens of top Ultimate Ancient Demons can definitely kill her. When she dies, we will use that space-time level Extreme Ultimate Treasure together. "

Joint use?

When these words are spoken, the ghost believes it!

But if Dovi Gu Demon died, then they all had a chance, but if Dovi Gu Demon didn't die, no one had a chance.

It's obvious!

"Who else did you contact?"

The Aromu Ancient Demon asked.........

Yunyang Ancient Demons said the rankings of the top Ancient Demon-level powerhouses, all of which were top Ultimate Ancient Demons ranked in the top tens.

"Moreover, we have also mastered a terrifying killing array, and together, it is enough to suppress the Dovi Ancient Demon!"

Yunyang Ancient Demon said again.

"Okay, I agree!"

The Arrow Mother Ancient Demon nodded.

After all, if the Duowei Ancient Demon is truly invincible, in case the Duowei Ancient Demon sweeps through many main divisions, let the main body of the Heavenly Tower occupy this large space-time bubble.

At that time, who can stop the Dovi Ancient Demon, and seeing that it is useless to resist, I am afraid that many Ultimate Ancient Demons will completely surrender to the Dovi Ancient Demon.

If this is the case, these Ultimate Ancient Demons will never have a chance to rise again, and they will never be able to break through to the Ultimate Ancient Demons of time and space.

As for the final calamity after the distant era, it was even more impossible for them to survive it, and even if the Dovi Ancient Demon broke through to the realm of the ultimate ancient demon of time and space, it would be impossible to help them.

So.

They had to make a choice, and besieging the Dovi Ancients was the best option.

"Aromu Ancient Demon, since you agreed, then make an oath, otherwise whoever leaks it out, we will all be in trouble. "

Yunyang Ancient Demon Dao.

The Aromu Ancient Demon made an oath, and these 3.1 oaths may not be very binding, but once they are violated, the other Ultimate Ancient Demons will perceive it and will definitely join forces to get rid of this Ultimate Ancient Demon.

So, no one wants to leak it out, and that's the importance of the oath. []

Soon.

The Alomu Ancient Demon made an oath, and the Yunyang Ancient Demon also left.

......

As for the alliance between the many ultimate ancient demons, Dovi Ancient Demon may have been aware of it, but she didn't care.

With her strength, it was impossible for her to form an alliance with other Ultimate Ancient Demons, and she was too confident in her own strength, so she ignored the situation.

In the years that followed, other space-time bubbles were also completely integrated, and all three hundred and sixty-five main departments were concentrated in this large space-time bubble.

And this large space-time bubble also has a new name - Endless Space-Time Domain!.
